name: What's my case worth for carpal tunnel after 10 years assembly line in West Jordan?
description: Medical + 2/3 wages + permanent rating; get evaluated.[6]

mainEntity.name: What's my case worth for carpal tunnel after 10 years assembly line in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 2/3 wages + permanent rating; get evaluated.[6]
acceptedAnswer.description: Depends on medical costs, wage loss, impairment rating; permanent partial averages thousands, varies widely.[6] No exact formula.[6] Key factors: (1) 2/3 wages temporary; (2) Disability % for hand; (3) Future care.[6] Get impairment rating post-healing, negotiate settlement.[1] Attorney evaluates true value.
